steps.title: Identify the relationship the researchers assume
steps.content: The researchers concluded that F13's higher oxygen-18 concentration means it formed at lower temperature. This conclusion depends on one relationship: higher oxygen-18 concentration must correspond to lower water temperature.

steps.title: Find which finding proves this inverse relationship
steps.content:
Choice C establishes exactly this—as oxygen-18 concentration increases, water temperature decreases (both with increasing depth).

This proves the inverse relationship the researchers assumed.

The other choices either reverse the relationship, show the two variables moving together rather than inversely, or contradict the conclusion.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
